metadata.champion_selection_reason: Prophet achieved Test R2=0.8965 on unseen 2025 data (Gen_Gap=0.17%). Holt-Winters (CV winner) failed the same data (R2=-2.45). Prophet's component architecture explicitly learned beta(precipitation) and beta(decomp_index) — the physical FOD drivers.

spatial_notes.phase_1: 4 Prophet models for known facility hotspots (point sources). Each assigned to its containing UC polygon via spatial join.
spatial_notes.phase_2: 1 Prophet model for background 'Other' group. Disaggregated to all UCs by population weight.

aggregate_forecast.note: City-wide aggregate: 5 sources (4 point-source facilities + 1 area). Total 12-month forecast: 4,883,441 t CO2e.

mitigation_context.rag_context: UC 'Iqbal UC-01' is a 'Critical' risk area forecasting 186,441 t CO2e annually. 78% comes from point source: Shahpur Kanjran [WWTP]. Remaining 22% from population-weighted area sources. Facility-level intervention yields highest mitigation ROI.

UC 'Wagah UC-09' is a 'Critical' risk area forecasting 243,075 t CO2e annually. 89% comes from point source: Lakhodair / Wagah Town [Landfill]. Remaining 11% from population-weighted area sources. Facility-level intervention yields highest mitigation ROI.

UC 'Gulberg UC-08' is a 'High' risk area forecasting 52,588 t CO2e annually. Emissions are fully population-driven (domestic wastewater, unmanaged organics). Policy must target household behaviour and informal waste handling infrastructure.

physical_drivers.note: decomp_index = temperature x humidity/100 acts as a dynamic IPCC k proxy. Monsoon precipitation triggers a ~2-month lagged CH4 spike via FOD kinetics.
